languages.text: "Как только я это сказал{mf||а}, я понял{mf||а} насколько это до одури банально звучит и утратил{mf||а} весь интерес к этой дискуссии".
"As soon as I said it, I realised how woefully trite it sounds and I lost all interest in this discussion."
languages.original_text: "Как только я это сказал{mf||а}, я понял{mf||а} насколько это до одури банально звучит и утратил{mf||а} весь интерес к этой дискуссии".

traits.locale_text: "As soon as I said it, I realised how woefully trite it sounds and I lost all interest in this discussion."
"As soon as I said it, I realised how woefully trite it sounds and I lost all interest in this discussion."
"As soon as I said it, I realised how woefully trite it sounds and I lost all interest in this discussion."

languages.text: «En cuanto he dicho esas palabras, me he dado cuenta de lo terriblemente manido que es este asunto. He perdido el interés».
languages.original_text: "As soon as I said it, I realised how woefully trite it sounds and I lost all interest in this discussion."

traits.locale_text: «En cuanto he dicho esas palabras, me he dado cuenta de lo terriblemente manido que es este asunto. He perdido el interés».

languages.text: “刚说出口，我就意识到这话俗不可耐，顿时对这场讨论失去了兴趣。”
languages.original_text: "As soon as I said it, I realised how woefully trite it sounds and I lost all interest in this discussion."

traits.locale_text: “刚说出口，我就意识到这话俗不可耐，顿时对这场讨论失去了兴趣。”

languages.text: « À l'instant même où les mots ont quitté ma bouche, j'ai compris à quel point ils étaient banals et j'ai perdu tout intérêt pour cette conversation. »
languages.original_text: "As soon as I said it, I realised how woefully trite it sounds and I lost all interest in this discussion."

traits.locale_text: « À l'instant même où les mots ont quitté ma bouche, j'ai compris à quel point ils étaient banals et j'ai perdu tout intérêt pour cette conversation. »

languages.text: "In dem Moment, als ich es sagte, erkannte ich, wie erbärmlich trivial es klingt und verlor jegliches Interesse an dieser Diskussion."
languages.original_text: "As soon as I said it, I realised how woefully trite it sounds and I lost all interest in this discussion."

traits.locale_text: "In dem Moment, als ich es sagte, erkannte ich, wie erbärmlich trivial es klingt und verlor jegliches Interesse an dieser Diskussion."

languages.text: 「そう言った途端、それがいかに陳腐な響きを持つかに気づき、この議論にまったく興味がなくなった」。
languages.original_text: "As soon as I said it, I realised how woefully trite it sounds and I lost all interest in this discussion."

languages.text: "Söyler söylemez kulağa ne kadar acınası derecede beylik geldiğini fark ettim ve bu tartışmaya olan tüm ilgimi kaybettim."
languages.original_text: "As soon as I said it, I realised how woefully trite it sounds and I lost all interest in this discussion."

traits.locale_text: "Söyler söylemez kulağa ne kadar acınası derecede beylik geldiğini fark ettim ve bu tartışmaya olan tüm ilgimi kaybettim."
